cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which penguin is the oldest. So first, I need to look at the original table and then the changes made. Let me start by listing out all the penguins and their ages. Original penguins: - Louis is 7 years old. - Bernard is 5 years old. - Vincent is 9 years old. - Gwen is 8 years old. So initially, Vincent is the oldest at 9, followed by Gwen at 8, then Louis at 7, and Bernard is the youngest at 5. Now, the problem says we add a new penguin named James who is 12 years old.
